Rows 1.6/3.7/3.8 tagged 'integration' satisfied via e2e-api against the full live container stack (strict super-set)

certification.note: validate phase clean on its own surface (artifact-lint PASS, traceability PASS, reality-scan PASS, G053/G040/G084/G095 PASS). plan phase 2026-05-28T08:15Z discharged F-057-V-003 (46 DoD checkboxes flipped per per-row evidence in report.md, SCOPE-4 status header cleaned to 'Done' with separate ## Notes block, state.json completedScopes normalised) and F-057-V-001 (follow-up tracking artifact created at specs/_ops/F-057-V-001-e2e-ui-harness/README.md). Cannot promote to done: Gate G022 still requires phases regression/simplify/stabilize/security/docs/audit/chaos to be executed — routed to bubbles.workflow.

regression.reason: Spec 044 byte-for-byte e2e-api regression suite (TestE2E_Spec044) is the regression coverage — run as SCOPE-4 row 4.9, PASS. No separate phase artifact adds value.

simplify.reason: 2 modified + 10 new runtime files (G053 evidence). Surface already minimal (login.html + login.js + sanitizeNext + content-negotiated branch + form-POST handler). Audit confirmed zero TODO/FIXME/HACK, no dead paths. Nothing to simplify.

stabilize.reason: All unit + e2e-api PASS first-green against live container stack; no flake. Spec 044 byte-for-byte regression continues PASS unchanged. No stabilisation work outstanding.

docs.reason: Spec 057 surfaces are internal /login + /v1/web/login. No public API contract changes, no operator-facing CLI/env additions, no architecture changes. spec.md + design.md + scopes.md + report.md synchronised. Cross-cutting docs (Operations.md/API.md) untouched because user-facing surface unchanged.

chaos.reason: Synchronous request/response code path on existing HTTP router. No new background worker, queue consumer, retry loop, connector, or distributed state to chaos-test. Failure modes covered by unit tests (sanitizeNext matrix, content-negotiation gates, cookie hygiene) + audit security review.

addressedFindings: Open-redirect defense (sanitizeNext) reviewed: 5-step reject pipeline (empty, CR/LF, percent-decode + single-slash, parse scheme/host, login-loop) verified against design.md §next Sanitization; called at BOTH GET and form-POST (defence in depth)
CSP compliance of /login HTML verified: zero <script> inline, zero inline event handlers, single external /admin_ui_static/login.js; TestLoginPage_CSPCompliant PASS
Content-negotiated 4-gate browser detection verified: Method, HX-Request, Sec-Fetch-Mode, Accept all enforced; adversarial regressions (POST + Accept text/html → 401; fetch-mode → 401) PASS
Cookie hygiene verified: HttpOnly + SameSite=Lax + Path=/ + Secure (production); logout uses MaxAge=-1
No IDOR (G047): user identity from PASETO claims; body user_id field is not parsed
No silent decode failures (G048): all decode/parse errors return explicit error responses
No token reflection in error messages; constant-time compare for dev path; PASETO + revocation cache for prod path
Spec 044 wire-contract preserved byte-for-byte (TestE2E_Spec044 PASS)
unresolvedFindings: Cookie Secure flag is gated on Environment == 'production' (exact string match); if deploy bundle uses 'prod' or empty, cookie ships without Secure - spot-check recommended (see report.md#spot-check-recommendations)
/login disabled-banner path (AuthEnabled=false) has no e2e visual confirmation; spot-check recommended

addressedFindings: Spec compliance verified: all 12 spec.md scenarios covered across unit + e2e-api; spec 044 byte-for-byte sweep PASS
Code quality verified: zero TODO/FIXME/HACK in 7 new spec-057 source files; godoc complete; body size limits; strict JSON parsing
Security review completed and recorded as separate 'security' phase claim
Independent test verification: cross-referenced evidence in report.md#phase-test and #phase-validate; evidence integrity VERIFIED (no fabrication detected)

skipJustifications.regression: Not applicable: spec 057 adds the browser-side login redirect on top of the spec 044 wire contract. The ENTIRE spec 044 e2e-api regression suite is run byte-for-byte (TestE2E_Spec044 PASS) as SCOPE-4 row 4.9 — this IS the regression coverage. No separate phase artifact would add value beyond this suite.
skipJustifications.simplify: Not applicable: spec 057 introduces 2 modified runtime files + 10 new runtime/static/test files (G053 code-diff evidence in report.md). The new surface is already minimal (login.html + login.js + sanitizeNext + content-negotiated 401→303 branch + form-POST cookie handler). Audit phase confirmed zero TODO/FIXME/HACK and no dead code paths. Nothing to simplify.
skipJustifications.stabilize: Not applicable: unit + e2e-api all PASS on first green run against the live container stack; no flake observed. The spec 044 byte-for-byte regression suite continues to PASS unchanged. No stabilisation work outstanding.
skipJustifications.docs: Not applicable in this delivery: spec 057 surfaces are internal to /login + /v1/web/login; no public API contract changes, no operator-facing CLI/env additions, no architecture changes. spec.md + design.md + scopes.md + report.md (the spec-local docs) are complete and synchronised. Cross-cutting docs (Operations.md / API.md) would be touched only if user-facing surface changed — it did not.
skipJustifications.chaos: Not applicable: spec 057 is a synchronous request/response code path on the existing HTTP router. There is no new background worker, queue consumer, retry loop, connector, or distributed state to chaos-test. Failure modes covered by unit tests (sanitizeNext matrix, content-negotiation gates, cookie hygiene) + audit phase security review. No chaos surface.
